text: I have a folder with 200 image files in mixed formats (PNG, JPEG, BMP, TIFF). Convert all of them to WEBP format with 80% quality. Rename each file using the pattern "IMG_YYYY-MM-DD_001.webp" based on the image's EXIF creation date. If no EXIF data exists, use the file's modification date. Move the converted files to a folder called "Processed_Images".
